mutation:
composite: replace 'output any decorrelated permutation' with a worst-channel-min-max
 objective over an input-given per-channel spy-strength weighting, and replace the
 textbook 'pick a nice permutation' goal with an explicit log-scaled relative-improvement
 score against a provably-worst do-nothing baseline (any pure shift).
theme: shuffle a codebook so residue spies learn nothing
title: Codebook Shuffle Against Residue Spies
strategies: do-nothing shift (identity/translation): every channel leaks at its absolute maximum -- the checker's own worst-case baseline

randomized local search with naive from-scratch rescoring: swap-based hill climbing that must re-balance ~p simultaneous worst-channel constraints; O(p^2) per rescoring pass caps iterations hard at large p, plateauing near a sqrt(p)-scale statistical floor

closed-form monomial-map search: try sigma(x) = x^k mod p over a small set of k coprime to p-1, using chi(x^k) = chi(x)^k structure so every channel decorrelates simultaneously; pick the k with smallest worst-channel leak via cheap O(p^2) evaluation per candidate
monomial search with wider parameter sweep / affine dressing (a*x^k+b) and per-test tuning of the candidate list -- headroom above the reference strong solution
